cmd: set -e; until [ -x /var/lib/easyenclave/bin/devopsdefender ]; do sleep 1; done; mkdir -p /data/dd-shell /tmp/dd-shell-bin-dir; cp /var/lib/easyenclave/bin/devopsdefender /tmp/dd-shell-bin-dir/devopsdefender; chmod +x /tmp/dd-shell-bin-dir/devopsdefender; exec /tmp/dd-shell-bin-dir/devopsdefender shell
